core_principles: Mathematical grids for asymmetric, structured layouts.
High contrast via stark compositions, minimal colors, and white space.

spacing_and_layout.borders: Grid Borders technique: use border-collapse style layouts with strict 1px borders (border-[#E4E4E7]).

components_strategy.global: Do NOT use default Shadcn rounded corners. Override all components to `rounded-none` or max `rounded-sm`. Avoid soft shadows.
components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp edges, primary buttons in #002FA7, high contrast text.
components_strategy.tables: Data-heavy focus. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Strict 1px borders between cells. No zebra striping. Add clear empty states.
components_strategy.inputs: Flat surfaces with 1px border. Focus states must use a stark 2px ring of #002FA7.
components_strategy.modals_dialogs: Solid background (no glassmorphism for this archetype), stark 1px border, high-contrast overlay (bg-black/60).

brand_logo.description: Minimalist geometric logo icon, black and white
brand_logo.usage: Use in header navigation, auth screens, and dashboard top-bar.

auth_background.description: Abstract geometric swiss style poster background, International Klein Blue and white
auth_background.usage: Use as a split-screen or background image on the login/register pages.

iconography.style: Regular or Bold weights to match the sharp UI.

testing.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'Cabinet Grotesk' via fontshare/custom import and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts.
Set up Tailwind to use these fonts in tailwind.config.js.
Override default shadcn component styles to match the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: remove rounded corners (use rounded-none), remove soft box-shadows.
The Dashboard should use a sharp, grid-based layout. The PDF Tracking table is the core widget, make it prominent, scanable, and functional.
Viewer page (/view/{id}) must be minimal, loading quickly with a highly legible interface without auth.
Use Supabase or Firebase as requested by the problem statement for backend data.
Never use pure black or grey without tint. Text color is #0A0A0A. Borders are #E4E4E7.
